name: Nexus Core AI Assistant
description: Premium locally-run personal AI assistant. Packaged with Ollama-integration, context-aware memory, web search engines, and stock lookups.

name: OmniScrape Automator
description: Industrial-grade Python scraping tool. Bypasses standard rate-limiting, extracts structured data, and outputs clean CSV/JSON results automatically.
specs: Exports to CSV, JSON, or databases

name: Chronoverse UI Kit
description: Futuristic, sci-fi themed user interface components for Next.js, React, and physical HTML. Packed with glowing neon components.

name: Local LLM Fine-Tuner
description: Complete codebase setup for fine-tuning small LLMs (like Llama-3-8B or Mistral-7B) on your custom company dataset.

name: 1-Hr System Consultation
description: Direct 1-on-1 strategy call with Anurag. Let's design your local AI infrastructure, automate data steps, or optimize databases.
